subject: FILIPINO
title: Malaki, Maliit, at Bantas
objective: Gumamit ng malaking titik at wastong bantas sa payak na pangungusap.
introduction: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Malaki, Maliit, at Bantas”.
A key word used in the lesson “Malaki, Maliit, at Bantas”.
A key word used in the lesson “Malaki, Maliit, at Bantas”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. masaya si lino and Masaya si Lino do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Malaki, Maliit, at Bantas”?

options.text: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.

The correct response is “Masaya si Lino.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “masaya si Lino.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.

The correct response is “Masaya si Lino.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Naku! Nahulog ang bola!” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang malaking titik sa simula ng pangungusap at tiyak na pangalan; gumamit ng angkop na tuldok, tandang pananong, o tandang padamdam.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Malaki, Maliit, at Bantas; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Malaki, Maliit, at Bantas.
